caption: A video sequence features a logo consisting of a blue 3D cube graphic above the text "theCUBE". In the beginning, the logo appears in the upper left and right corners of a screen. A gray horizontal bar spans the width of the screen, containing the white text "Hosts & Analysts", "Engineering", and "Production". The background below the bar is a solid, light gray. As the sequence progresses, the scene shifts to a white background. The blue cube logo and "theCUBE" text move to the center of the frame. Finally, the logo is accompanied by two geometric shapes behind the cube: a red hexagon on the left and a dark blue hexagon on the right. The text "theCUBE" remains positioned beneath the central blue cube graphic.
